ogTitle: Opossum Bay vs Orford: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Opossum Bay and Orford.
heading: Opossum Bay vs Orford — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Opossum Bay, Tasmania and Orford, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Opossum Bay and Orford have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Opossum Bay or Orford safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Opossum Bay has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Orford scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Opossum Bay scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Orford scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Opossum Bay or Orford?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Opossum Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
